description: CompositionGrey printed sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck and full front buttoned placket with pintucks from the shoulder to the upper bustlineFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed grey kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this subtle print, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a white chudidar and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
